title: ficus grossularioides var. subpanduriformis
intro: Ficus grossularioides var. subpanduriformis, also known as the Chinese banyan, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the ficus plant species that is native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ficus grossularioides var. subpanduriformis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to treat various health conditions.
